primary.description: Primary agent with full access to all code areas for coordinating the Ralph workflow refactoring project.

workflow-gui.description: Ralph GUI - Angular frontend application. Contains UI components, services, and Angular-specific code for the code review interface.

workflow-core.description: Ralph workflow core entry points. Root-level files: lib.rs (module declarations), main.rs (CLI entry), banner.rs (ASCII banner), exit_pause.rs (exit handling). Application bootstrap and top-level orchestration.

workflow-reducer.description: Event-driven state management core. Modules: reducer (state transitions), pipeline (data flow orchestration), checkpoint (state snapshots), phases (workflow stages). The functional heart of the application.

workflow-execution.description: Execution and runtime. Modules: executor (task execution logic), runtime (process/thread management). Handles work dispatch and lifecycle management.

workflow-io.description: I/O boundaries. Modules: io (input/output operations, file reading/writing, network calls), files (file system operations, path handling). Primary boundary between domain logic and external systems.

workflow-workspace.description: Workspace abstraction and boundaries. Modules: workspace (workspace discovery, project detection), boundary (external system interfaces). Defines the interface between the application and user projects.

workflow-git.description: Git operations helper. Module: git_helpers. Contains git operations like diff parsing, commit analysis, branch detection. Boundary module that interacts with the git executable.

workflow-config.description: Configuration and CLI. Modules: config (application configuration, settings loading), cli (command-line argument parsing, subcommands). All user-facing configuration handling.

workflow-app.description: Application orchestration. Module: app. Main application layer that coordinates all other modules, wiring together components.

workflow-logging.description: Logging infrastructure. Modules: logging (log message construction, formatting), logger (log output handling, sinks). Observability and debugging support.

workflow-monitoring.description: Observability. Modules: monitoring (metrics collection, performance tracking), diagnostics (error reporting, debugging utilities). System reliability and troubleshooting support.

workflow-misc.description: Shared utilities. Modules: common (shared types, utilities), platform (OS-specific code), rendering (UI/text rendering), templates (message/response templates). Cross-cutting functionality.

workflow-future.description: Experimental and specialized features. Modules: benchmarks (performance measurement), interrupt (signal handling), language_detector (programming language identification), review_metrics (code review analytics). Advanced or niche functionality.

workflow-agents.description: AI agent integrations. Module: agents. Contains AI agent abstractions or integrations for the code review workflow.

workflow-prompts.description: Prompt engineering. Modules: guidelines (prompt guidelines, best practices), prompts (prompt templates, message construction). Drives AI interactions.

workflow-json.description: JSON parsing and serialization. Module: json_parser. Handles JSON parsing, validation, and structured data handling from files and APIs.

workflow-cloud.description: Cloud integrations. Module: cloud. Handles cloud service integrations, remote operations, or cloud-native functionality. Boundary module for external cloud APIs.

test-helpers.description: Test utilities crate. Shared testing utilities, test fixtures, and helper functions used across the test suite.

xtask.description: Build automation crate. Build tasks, development scripts, and project maintenance utilities. CI/CD and development workflow automation.

workflow-tests.description: Integration tests. End-to-end tests, integration scenarios, and test harnesses in the tests/ directory that span multiple modules.

workflow-lints.description: Linting rules crate. Custom linting rules, code quality checks, and static analysis that define project code standards.

workflow-docs.description: Documentation. Architecture decision records, code style guides, API documentation, and developer guides in the docs/ directory.
